experiences.title: Graduation Intern
experiences.description: As a graduation intern I have conducted research on the profitability of events in the South-East region of the Netherlands. This research was requested by the Heineken Brouwerijen Evenementen Service, abbreviated as HBES, which is a department that provides guidance and necessities for all extraordinary activities within the catering industry.

experiences.title: Assistent Producer
experiences.description: As a production intern I have been working on the television program 'Typisch RTL'. I conducted all kinds of organizational activities like; location scouting, arrange necessities for recordings, collecting footage, arranging licenses, create call-sheets, etc. In additionI assisted during shoots on other programs like 'Ik weet wat jij deed' & 'Weten zij veel'

recommendations:
Onno De Looff

Frank is a social skilled person. As a student he was able to open doors and work together with sales, finance and business-analists. That made him not only a good colleague, but it also contributed to worthy outcomes in his Intern Assignment! I can recommend Frank to any HR adviser.
